creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #1)
> Can you review this port, please? It's not installing nothing but empty
> directories.

Can do. Just a note to let you know I'm aware.
I'm going to submit an update that I hadn't intended
to until after this one had been submitted. But...

I'll have something within the next couple hours.

Thanks for the report!

--Chris
